title: vigna juncea var. juncea
intro: Vigna juncea var. juncea, also known as Indian cluster bean or Katukaduka, is a variety of the Vigna juncea plant, a type of legume native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Vigna juncea var. juncea include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and provide antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions, infusions, and powdered forms to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory disorders.
